svg.text: Each layer transforms the data one step closer to executable SQL
Groups tokens into a structured tree (AST)
Checks the AST against config files
⚠ Unknown field → warning with fix hint | ✕ Undeclared alias → error, abort
Resolves SQuery names to SQL names
LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UP_SingleRoles] r ON asr.Role_Id = r.Id
Assembles all parts into the final query
LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UP_SingleRoles] r ON asr.Role_Id = r.Id
WHERE asr.ValidTo > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND (asr.OwnerType = 2015) ORDER BY asr.Id DESC
